zh.lifeSummary: 當Phebe Way於1768年6月17日出生在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 哈文沃特波利時，她的父親Samuel Way29歲，母親Sarah Lewis27歲。她於1789年1月18日與Layton Cunningham Sr在美國康乃狄克州利其費爾德結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1852年3月7日在美國紐約州艾利蘭卡斯特蘭卡斯特享年83歲，埋葬在美國紐約州艾利蘭卡斯特蘭卡斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Phebe Way于1768年6月17日出生在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文沃特波利时，她的父亲Samuel Way29岁，母亲Sarah Lewis27岁。她于1789年1月18日与Layton Cunningham Sr在美国康涅狄格州利其費爾德结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1852年3月7日在美国纽约州艾利蘭卡斯特蘭卡斯特享年83岁，埋葬在美国纽约州艾利蘭卡斯特蘭卡斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Way
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly southern): topographic name for someone who lived near a road or path, from Middle English wei (Old English weg, cognate with Old Norse vegr, Old High German weg), or a habitational name from some minor place called with this word, as for example any of the places called Way or Waye in Devon or Way in Somerset and Kent.

variants.name: Wei
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ming, Wei, Li, Chao, Hong, Cheng, Jin, Ling, Ping, Yuan, Bin, Dong, Lan, Min, Chang, Chong, Chung, Houa, Pai, Sha, Yiming.

Mandarin form of the surname 魏, a term referring to ‘the buildings at either side of the gates of the royal palace’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Wei (魏), originally the name of a fief (located in Ruicheng in Shanxi province) granted to Bi Wan, an official in the state of Jin. In 403  BC , the state of Jin was split into three, one of which was the state of Wei (魏), established by Wei Huan Zi (魏桓子). After this state was annexed by the state of Qin in 225  BC , its name was adopted by some people as a surname. (ii) adopted in place of the surname Mi (羋) by Wei Ran (魏冉), an official who lived in the state of Qin during the Warring States period (475–221  BC ). (iii) borne by descendants of Wei Liao Weng (魏了翁), a scholar during the Southern Song dynasty (1127–1279  AD ), who changed his original name Gao (高) to his uncle's surname Wei (魏).

variants.name: Wey
meanings: English (Dorset and Somerset): variant of   Way  .
Dutch: variant, mostly archaic or Americanized, of Weij, a topographic name from weide ‘pasture, meadow’ (compare Vanderweide ).
German: from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic personal names based on the element wīg ‘battle’ (compare Weyers ). This surname is also found in Belgium.

variants.name: Waye
meanings: English (Devon and Kent): variant of   Way  .

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: British Forces Capture Fort Griswold
historicEvents.description: The capture of Fort Griswold was the final act of treason that Benedict Arnold committed. This would be a British victory. On the American side 85 were killed, 35 wounded and paroled, 28 taken prisoner, 13 escaped, and 1 twelve year old was captured and released.
historicEvents.urlTitle: History of the Battle of Groton and The Burning of New London

historicEvents.description: Bill of Rights guarantees individual freedom.

historicEvents.title: Brass is Discovered
historicEvents.description: "In 1802, brass was identified in Waterbury, Connecticut. This gave the city the nickname ""The Brass City."" Brass dominated the city and helped to create the city. The motto of the city is Quid Aere Perennius, which means What is more lasting than brass? in Latin."
historicEvents.urlTitle: Connecticut History.Org- Birth of the Brass Valley

historicEvents.description: War of 1812. U.S. declares war on Britain over British interference with American maritime shipping and westward expansion.
Historical Boundaries: 1821: Erie, New York, United States

historicEvents.title: The Black Hawk War
historicEvents.description: Convinced that a group of Native American tribes were hostile, The United States formed a frontier militia to stop them in their tracks. Even though Black Hawk was hoping to avoid bloodshed while trying to resettle on tribal land, U.S. officials opened fire on the Native Americans. Black Hawk then responded to this confrontation by successfully attacking the militia at the Battle of Stillman's Run and then left northward. After a few months the militia caught up with Black Hawk and his men and defeated them at the Battle of Wisconsin Heights. While being weakened by hunger, injuries and desertion, Black Hawk and the rest of the many native survivors retreated towards the Mississippi. Unfortunately, Black Hawk and other leaders were later captured when they surrendered to the US forces and were then imprisoned for a year.

en.lifeSummary: When Phebe Way was born on 17 June 1768, in Waterbury, New Haven, Connecticut, United States, her father, Samuel Way, was 29 and her mother, Sarah Lewis, was 27. She married Layton Cunningham Sr on 18 January 1789, in Litchfield, Connecticut, United States. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 7 March 1852, in Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, United States, at the age of 83, and was buried in Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Phebe Way est née le 17 juin 1768, à Waterbury, New Haven, Connecticut, États-Unis, son père, Samuel Way, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Sarah Lewis, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Layton Cunningham Sr le 18 janvier 1789, à Litchfield, Connecticut, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 mars 1852, à Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, États-Unis, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Phebe Way am 17. Juni 1768 in Waterbury, New Haven, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Samuel Way 29 und ihre Mutter Sarah Lewis 27. Sie hat am 18. Januar 1789 in Litchfield, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten Layton Cunningham Sr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. März 1852 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Phebe Way è nata il il 17 giugno 1768 nel Waterbury, New Haven, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Samuel Way, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Sarah Lewis, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Layton Cunningham Sr il 18 gennaio 1789, nel Litchfield, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 7 marzo 1852, nel Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolta a Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Phebe Wayが1768年6月17日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンワテルブリーで生まれた時，父Samuel Wayは29歳，母Sarah Lewisは27歳であった。1789年1月18日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州リトチフィールドでLayton Cunningham Srと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1852年3月7日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州エリーランカスターランカスターで83歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州エリーランカスターランカスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Phebe Way(이)가 1768년 6월 17일 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 왓르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Samuel Way(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Lewis(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1789년 1월 18일 미국 코네티컷 주 리트ch필드에서 Layton Cunningham Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1852년 3월 7일 미국 뉴욕 주 에리 랭커스터 랭커스터에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴욕 주 에리 랭커스터 랭커스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Phebe Way nasceu em 17 de junho de 1768, em Waterbury, New Haven, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Samuel Way, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Lewis, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Layton Cunningham Sr em 18 de janeiro de 1789, em Litchfield, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de março de 1852, em Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, com 83 anos, e foi sepultada em Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Phebe Way родилась 17 июня 1768 г. в местности вэитирбури, ню хавен, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Samuel Way было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Lewis, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Layton Cunningham Sr 18 января 1789 г. в местности личфиелд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 7 марта 1852 г. в местности ланкастир, ланкастир, эри, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности ланкастир, ланкастир, эри, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Phebe Way nació el 17 de junio de 1768, en Waterbury, New Haven, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, su papá, Samuel Way, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Sarah Lewis, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Layton Cunningham Sr el 18 de enero de 1789, en Litchfield, Connecticut, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 7 de marzo de 1852, en Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultada en Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, Nueva York, Estados Unidos.
